threats.name: CAS poisoning and EffectReceipt forgery
threats.attack_surface: Tampered content-addressed bytes, hash-confusion, receipt back-dating, or chain-splice across host-effect evidence.
threats.defense_primitive: CAS read-time hash verification plus canonical, domain-separated, length-prefixed EffectReceipt hashes and chain-link recomputation.

threats.name: Declassification authority abuse
threats.attack_surface: Forged, over-scoped, expired, wrong-sink, or wrong-epoch declassification receipts.
threats.defense_primitive: Receipt id recomputation over exact sink policy, forbidden label set, actor, purpose, epoch, and revocation freshness.

threats.name: MCP mutation abuse
threats.attack_surface: Scope escalation, delegation beyond parent authority, missing rollback evidence, or replayed mutation sessions.
threats.defense_primitive: Audience-bound capability token chains, attenuated delegation, rollback commands, signed action receipts, and session digest verification.

threats.name: LTV witness collusion and crypto-suite downgrade
threats.attack_surface: Collusive re-attestation, stale witness reuse, or downgrade to a weaker crypto_suite discriminator.
threats.defense_primitive: Release gate must require witness independence evidence, suite-discriminator binding, and fail-closed re-attestation verification before LTV claims ship.

threats.name: Conformal calibration and Sentinel signal poisoning
threats.attack_surface: Poisoned Phase-0 corpus records, shifted calibration signals, or Sybil-amplified Sentinel inputs.
threats.defense_primitive: Signed calibration artifacts, canonical corpus exchange, verifier recomputation, and signal-poisoning/Sybil thresholds.

threats.name: Fleet-log equivocation and quorum replay
threats.attack_surface: Partition/catch-up races, conflicting validator attestations, duplicate partial signatures, or quorum-certificate replay.
threats.defense_primitive: Canonical action hashing, distinct-validator quorum accounting, equivocation fault receipts, and threshold-signature replay rejection.
